item.title: Memorial services for Jesse Jackson begin at Chicago HQ of his civil rights group
item.description: Memorial services for the Rev. Jesse Jackson Sr. begin in Chicago and stretch across the country to honor his long civil rights legacy

item.title: Most Americans see Iran as an enemy but doubt Trump's judgment on military force, AP-NORC poll finds
item.description: A new AP-NORC poll finds that as the U.S. and Iran head into their next round of nuclear talks in Geneva, many U.S. adults continue to view Iran’s nuc...

item.title: DHS official promises immigration agents won't be at polling places during midterms
item.description: A DHS official is promising top state election administrators that immigration agents will not be at polling places during November's midterm election

item.title: Toucan seen flying around Sin City has been rescued
item.description: A toucan seen flying around the Las Vegas desert has been captured by a bird rescue group

item.title: NYC man who randomly punched influencer convicted for that assault and other attacks
item.description: A man who randomly punched a woman walking down a Manhattan street nearly two years ago has been convicted of hate crime charges for that assault and ...
